Paper 123: extraction labels compound 2 as '6-iodoquinazolin-4(3H)-one' but paper text shows compound 2 = 2-amino-5-iodobenzoic acid; 6-iodoquinazolin-4(3H)-one is compound 3. The mp(dec) 219-221 °C in the quote is for compound 2 (2-amino-5-iodobenzoic acid), not for 6-iodoquinazolin-4(3H)-one. Q1 fails.
